ddls:
CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing channel (e.g., Search, Email, Direct) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marketing channel */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region where the channel is active */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of channel (e.g., digital, traditional) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the channel (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the channel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channels_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing channel */,
  "intra_channel_effect" TEXT /* Intra-channel effect: (Last week share) X (Change in conversion) */,
  "mix_shift_effect" TEXT /* Mix shift effect: (Last week conversion diff vs avg) X (Change in share) */,
  "interaction_effect" TEXT /* Interaction effect: (Change in share) X (Change in conversion) */,
  "all_effects" TEXT /* All effects: Combined effect of all interactions */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* Conversion rate */,
  "traffic_share" TEXT /* Share of traffic */,
  "total_conversions" INTEGER /* Total number of conversions */,
  "total_traffic" INTEGER /* Total traffic */,
  "cost_per_conversion" TEXT /* Cost per conversion */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region where the performance metric is recorded */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "source_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source channel */,
  "target_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target channel */,
  "interaction_effect" TEXT /* Interaction effect: (Change in share of source channel) X (Change in conversion of target channel) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction was recorded */,
  "source_region_id" INTEGER /* Region of the source channel */,
  "target_region_id" INTEGER /* Region of the target channel */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "source_campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source campaign */,
  "target_campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_interactions_source_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_interactions_target_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_interactions_source_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_interactions_target_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_interactions_source_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_interactions_target_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region where the campaign is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
